showcase.heading: BUILT BY SOMEONE WHO ACTUALLY RUNS CREWS
showcase.feature1.title: NO TRAINING REQUIRED
showcase.feature1.copy: Your crew opens it once. They see their jobs. They know what to do. That's it.
showcase.feature1.why: Every other tool requires days of training. Your guys won't use software they don't understand. OPS is obvious from the first tap.
showcase.feature2.title: PHOTO DOCUMENTATION THAT WORKS
showcase.feature2.copy: Before/after shots. Progress updates. Damage documentation. Markup with arrows and notes. All organized by job.
showcase.feature2.why: No more hunting through text chains for that one photo. Everything lives with the job it belongs to.
showcase.feature3.title: A SCHEDULE YOUR CREW ACTUALLY READS
showcase.feature3.copy: An intuitive job board and clean daily schedule. Your crew sees what's coming up, who's assigned where, and what needs to get done — all in one glance.
showcase.feature3.why: No more morning phone calls asking “where am I going today?” Your crew opens the app and they're read in.
showcase.feature4.title: DIRECT LINE TO THE BUILDER
showcase.feature4.copy: Missing a feature? Speak directly to the founder. We listen. We build what you actually need.
showcase.feature4.why: No support tickets. No chatbots. You talk to the person who built it and uses it every day.

whatIsOps.heading: JOB MANAGEMENT SOFTWARE BUILT FOR SERVICE-BASED BUSINESSES
whatIsOps.definition: OPS is a field-first job management app for service-based businesses and trades crews. It handles project tracking, crew scheduling, photo documentation, client management, estimates, invoicing, and turn-by-turn navigation to job sites — all from one app that works offline.
whatIsOps.origin: Built by a tradesperson who scaled a deck and railing business from $0 to $1.6M in 4 years. In his last year, he tried Jobber, ServiceTitan, and Housecall Pro. His crew wouldn't touch any of them — too complex, too unintuitive. So he built OPS, and used it to break the million-dollar mark.
whatIsOps.detail1.title: Offline-first architecture
whatIsOps.detail1.copy: OPS works without cell signal. Changes save locally and sync automatically when connectivity returns. Built for basements, rural areas, underground, and anywhere service drops.
whatIsOps.detail2.title: Field-optimized design
whatIsOps.detail2.copy: Dark theme for battery life and sunlight readability. Large touch targets for gloves. Swipe gestures for status updates. Designed for a phone in your back pocket, not a desk.
whatIsOps.detail3.title: Complete job lifecycle
whatIsOps.detail3.copy: From lead to invoice. Pipeline CRM to track opportunities, estimates with line items and deposits, project and task management, crew scheduling with conflict detection, photo documentation with markup, and invoicing with payment tracking.
whatIsOps.detail4.title: Role-based permissions
whatIsOps.detail4.copy: Five roles from Admin to Crew. Field workers see only their assigned tasks. Office staff manage projects, clients, and financials. Admins control everything. Each person sees exactly what they need.
whatIsOps.pricing: Free 30-day trial with up to 10 users. Plans start at $90/month for 3 crew members, $140/month for 5, and $190/month for 10. Every plan includes every feature — pricing is based on crew size only.
whatIsOps.platforms: Available on iOS (App Store) and web (app.opsapp.co). Android is in development.
trades.heading: ONE APP. EVERY CREW.
trades.subtext: OPS works for any service-based trade that sends crews to job sites. Here's how different trades use it.
trades.trade1.name: ELECTRICIANS
trades.trade1.copy: Track service calls and installations. Assign electricians to jobs with specific time slots. Document panel work and wiring with photo markup. Navigate between residential and commercial sites.
trades.trade2.name: PLUMBERS
trades.trade2.copy: Manage emergency calls alongside scheduled maintenance. Your crew sees the next job before they finish the current one. Photo documentation for pipe conditions and completed repairs.
trades.trade3.name: HVAC
trades.trade3.copy: Schedule seasonal maintenance routes. Track install projects from estimate to final inspection. Crew members check their daily schedule and navigate directly to each site.
trades.trade4.name: LANDSCAPING
trades.trade4.copy: Manage recurring weekly properties and one-off projects in the same app. Before/after photo documentation for every visit. Route your crew efficiently between sites.
trades.trade5.name: PAINTING
trades.trade5.copy: Track multi-day projects across prep, prime, and finish coats. Document surfaces with photo markup before starting. Assign rooms or sections to different crew members.
trades.trade6.name: CLEANING
trades.trade6.copy: Schedule recurring residential and commercial cleaning routes. Track time per property. Your crew opens the app and sees exactly where they're going and what needs to be done.
trades.notListed: Don't see your trade? Reach out. We'd love to learn how OPS can serve your business — and build features that actually help your crew.
